meta.title: Meya Conservatory of Chinese Music | Sydney
meta.description: Sydney's premier Chinese music school offering traditional instrument lessons, orchestra programs, and cultural events across Chatswood and Burwood campuses.

hero.title: Discover the Beautiful Melody of Great China
hero.subtitle: Sydney Meya Conservatory of Chinese Music

intro.title: Welcome to Meya Conservatory
intro.description: We are Sydney's leading Chinese music education centre, dedicated to preserving and sharing the beauty of traditional Chinese instruments. With two campuses in Chatswood and Burwood, we offer comprehensive music education for students of all ages and levels.

courses.title: Our Music Lessons
courses.subtitle: Learn traditional Chinese instruments from master musicians

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Join us for performances, workshops, and cultural celebrations

orchestra.title: Join Our Orchestra
orchestra.description: Experience the power of ensemble playing. Our orchestra brings together students of all levels to perform traditional and contemporary Chinese music.

cta.title: Start Your Musical Journey Today
cta.description: Book a free trial lesson and discover the joy of Chinese music. Our experienced teachers will guide you every step of the way.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Preserving Chinese Musical Heritage in Australia

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: The Meya Conservatory of Chinese Music is dedicated to promoting Chinese music culture and education in Australia. We strive to build a bridge between Eastern and Western cultures through the universal language of music.

chatswood.name: Chatswood Campus
chatswood.description: Our flagship campus offering the full range of Chinese instruments with modern practice rooms and performance spaces.

burwood.name: Burwood Campus
burwood.description: Our second campus providing convenient access for students in Sydney's inner west, with dedicated teaching studios.

values.title: Our Values
values.excellenceDesc: Every instructor is a professionally trained musician with years of performance and teaching experience.
values.cultureDesc: We honour the rich traditions of Chinese music while embracing modern teaching methods.
values.communityDesc: We foster a vibrant community of music lovers through concerts, workshops, and cultural events.

teachers.title: Meet Our Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Learn from experienced musicians and educators

lessons.title: Our Music Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Explore traditional Chinese instruments across two campuses

orchestra.title: Join Our Orchestra
orchestra.subtitle: Experience the magic of Chinese orchestral music

about.title: About Our Orchestra
about.description: The Meya Chinese Orchestra is a vibrant ensemble of students and professional musicians who come together to celebrate and perform traditional Chinese orchestral music. We welcome musicians of all levels to join our community.

benefits.title: Why Join?
benefits.ensembleDesc: Play alongside other musicians and develop your ensemble skills in a supportive environment.
benefits.performanceDesc: Perform at concerts, community events, and cultural festivals throughout Sydney.
benefits.growthDesc: Expand your repertoire and deepen your understanding of Chinese orchestral music.

apply.title: How to Join
apply.description: We hold auditions throughout the year. No matter your level, there's a place for you in our orchestra family.

shop.title: Shop Our Products
shop.subtitle: We proudly offer a curated selection of traditional Chinese musical instruments for purchase, catering to both beginners and seasoned musicians.

news.title: News & Updates
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest from Meya Conservatory

booking.title: Book a Trial Lesson
booking.subtitle: Experience the joy of Chinese music with a free trial lesson

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your trial lesson.

form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you soon.

career.title: Join Our Team
career.subtitle: We're looking for passionate musicians and educators
career.noPositions: No open positions at the moment. Check back soon!

benefits.growthDesc: Continuous learning opportunities and professional development support.
benefits.communityDesc: Join a passionate team dedicated to Chinese music education.
benefits.flexibleDesc: Work arrangements that suit your lifestyle and teaching preferences.

footer.tagline: Discover the Beautiful Melody of Great China, all in Meya Music of Australia.
footer.copyright: Meya Conservatory of Chinese Music. All rights reserved.

performanceHire.title: Performance Hire
performanceHire.subtitle: Bring authentic Chinese music to your event
performanceHire.description: Our talented musicians are available for performances at weddings, corporate events, cultural festivals, and private functions. We offer solo performances, small ensembles, and full orchestra bookings.

services.soloDesc: A single musician performing on your choice of traditional instrument.
services.ensembleDesc: A group of 3-5 musicians for an intimate musical experience.
services.orchestraDesc: Our complete orchestra for a grand, immersive performance.
